name: Pasta e Fagioli-2
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground pepper (to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the Italian sausage and cook until browned.
3. Add chopped onion and minced garlic; sauté until onions are translucent.
4. Stir in the stewed tomatoes, spaghetti sauce, water, bullion cube, bay leaf, beans, celery, and carrots.
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cover the pot.
6. Simmer for an hour or so.
7. Add salad macaroni and additional water if needed; simmer until pasta is cooked through (about 15 minutes).
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve hot with crusty French bread and your choice of wine.
